;<span id="Dragging_mode">dragging mode</span> (drag&size mode)
:state of an [[Glossary:Element|element]]/[[Glossary:Component|component]], in which the component(s) can easily be resized or dragged to a new location in the [[Glossary:Element_window|element window]]. The other two basic modes are: [[Glossary:Presentation_mode|presentation mode]] ([[Glossary:Component|components]] are displayed like during repetitions) and [[Glossary:Editing_mode|editing mode]] (components can easily be edited, e.g. by typing in new texts, etc.). [[Glossary:Component|Components]] in '''dragging mode''' are usually darker than in the other two modes. To enter the '''dragging mode''', ''Alt+click'' the [[Glossary:Component|component]] or the [[Glossary:Element|element]]. You can also press ''Ctrl+E'' twice. To drag a [[Glossary:Component|component]] in the '''dragging mode''', press the mouse button over the component, and, without releasing it, move it to a new location within the element
